message:
chore(gitignore): ignore macOS AppleDouble resource fork files

macOS creates `._*` files (AppleDouble format) when writing to
non-HFS+ filesystems. These are metadata-only artifacts that carry
no useful information for the project and clutter `git status`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -6,3 +6,6 @@ legacy_ext4_and_btrfs_code/
 
 # bv (beads viewer) local config and caches
 .bv/
+
+# macOS AppleDouble / resource fork files
+._*
